---
title: "Species Richness Overview"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    logo: image_logo.png
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
##### Install package (only needed the first time)#####
# install.packages("flexdashboard")
# install.packages("dplyr")
# install.packages("DT")
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("ggpmisc")
# install.packages("ggrepel")
# install.packages("leaflet")
#######################################################


library(flexdashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggrepel)
library(DT)
library(leaflet)


# Import csv processed data-set

join_df_ab_genus <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_ab_genus.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
join_df_rich <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_rich.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
richness_df <-read.csv("processed_data/richness_df.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
abundance_df_genus <-read.csv("processed_data/abundance_df_genus.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# External Variable

landuse_map_url <- "https://geo.agriculture.gov.au/arcgis/services/ABARESFLS/Land_use_of_Australia_2010_11_to_2015_16/MapServer/WMSServer"

landuse_map_layer <-4

landuse_map_attribute <- "ABARES 2022, Land use of Australia 2010–11 to 2015–16, 250 m, ABARES, Canberra, September CC BY 4.0."

landuse_legend_image_url <- paste0("https://geo.agriculture.gov.au:443/arcgis/services/ABARESFLS/Land_use_of_Australia_2010_11_to_2015_16/MapServer/WMSServer?request=GetLegendGraphic%26version=1.3.0%26format=image/png%26layer=",landuse_map_layer)

landuse_legend_image_html <-paste0("<h5>Land Use Type</h5><img src='",landuse_legend_image_url, "'style='width:300px'>")


```


PCA
=======================================================================

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


### PCA


```{r}

df_pca <- join_df_rich %>%
  select(stateCode,
         unique_species_count,
         precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre,
         solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre,
         temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius,
         average_soil_pH_unitless,
         average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre) %>%
  na.omit()


df_pca <- df_pca %>%
  rename(precipitation = precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre ,
         solarRadiation = solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre,
         temperatureMean = temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius,
         soilPH = average_soil_pH_unitless,
         soilEC = average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre)

pca_model <- prcomp(
  df_pca %>% select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  select(-unique_species_count), 
  scale. = TRUE)

scores <- as.data.frame(pca_model$x) %>%
  bind_cols(df_pca %>% select(stateCode, unique_species_count))
loadings <- as.data.frame(pca_model$rotation) %>%
  mutate(variable = rownames(.))
arrow_scale <- 2
loadings <- loadings %>%
  mutate(
    PC1 = PC1 * arrow_scale,
    PC2 = PC2 * arrow_scale
  )

var_explained <- pca_model$sdev^2 / sum(pca_model$sdev^2)
pc1_lab <- paste0("PC1 (", round(var_explained[1] * 100, 1), "%)")
pc2_lab <- paste0("PC2 (", round(var_explained[2] * 100, 1), "%)")

ggplot(scores, aes(PC1, PC2)) +

  # points colored by state
  geom_point(aes(fill = stateCode,
                  size = unique_species_count),
             shape = 21,
             color = "black",
             stroke = 0.3,
             alpha = 0.4) +

  # variable arrows
  geom_segment(data = loadings,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1, yend = PC2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "red",
               linewidth = 1.5) +

  # variable labels
    geom_label_repel(
    data = loadings,
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, label = variable),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black",
    label.size = 0.2,   # border thickness
    alpha = 0.9,
    box.padding = 0.3,
    point.padding = 0.2
  ) +

  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = pc1_lab,
    y = pc2_lab,color = "State", size = "Richness")


```


Scatter Plot
=======================================================================

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


### Precipitation


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```


### Solar Radiation


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```


### Max Temperature


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = maximumTemperature_degreeCelsius, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```


### Min Temperature


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = minimumTemperature_degreeCelsius, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```

### Mean Temperature


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```

### Soil pH


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = average_soil_pH_unitless, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```


### Soil electric conductivity


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = after_stat(paste(rr.label))),
               parse = TRUE,
              label.x = "right",
              label.y = "top")+
  facet_wrap(~ stateCode)

```



Soil Texture
=======================================================================

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Whole

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


### QLD

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "QD"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```

### NSW

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "NS"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```

### VIC

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "VC"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```

### SA

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "SA"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```

### WA

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "WA"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```

### NT

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "NT"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


### TAS

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "TC"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand","Clay loam", "Loam","Loamy sand","Heavy clay"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


Interactive Map
=======================================================================


Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Species Richness Map

```{r}
pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "Reds",   # light → dark
  domain = richness_df$unique_species_count
)

richness_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(unique_species_count))%>%
  leaflet() %>%
      addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
      addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
      addWMSTiles(
        baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
        layers = landuse_map_layer,
        options = WMSTileOptions(
          format = "image/png",
          transparent = TRUE
        ),
        group = "Land Use",
        attribution = landuse_map_attribute
      )%>%
   
      addControl(
        html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
        position = "bottomleft"
        )%>%
      
      
      addLayersControl(
        baseGroups = c("Land Use","Base", "Satellite"),
        options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
      )%>%
      addCircleMarkers(
        lng = ~longitude_Degree,
        lat = ~latitude_Degree,
        color = "black",
        weight = 1,
        fillColor = ~pal(unique_species_count),
        fillOpacity = 0.8,
        radius = 5,
        popup = ~paste0(
            "<b>Unique Species Number:</b> ", unique_species_count
            )
      ) %>%
      addLegend(
        "bottomright",
        pal = pal,
        values = ~unique_species_count,
        title = "Species Richness(unique count)",
        opacity = 1)


```
